title: Strategy Backtest Lab
subtitle: Simulate a risk-control strategy based on historical composite risk scores: reduce exposure when risk is high, go full when risk is low.

description.title: Backtest note
description.content: This backtest uses the composite risk score as a proxy for risky asset returns (higher score implies lower simulated return) to validate the risk-control logic. For real investments, it is recommended to use actual asset prices (e.g. SPY, CSI 300) for more accurate backtesting.

noData.title: Insufficient historical data
noData.subtitle: Please run data collection first and accumulate at least 30 days of composite risk scores
